text:
N0415E1 High-Risk Drug (Is Taking): Anticoagulant CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking anticoagulant medication during the last seven days or since admission/entry or reentry if less than seven days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
939 ANTCGLNT_INDCTN_CD ANTCGLNT_INDCTN_CD N0415E2 High-Risk Drug (Indication): Anticoagulant CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking anticoagulant medication and whether there is an indication noted for all
